result:
I'm here — everything's connected and working.

Quick status: MCP servers responding (`pyfinagent-data`, `pyfinagent-risk` loaded; `playwright`, `pyfinagent-backtest`, `pyfinagent-signals` deferred), on `main` at `f69b14bd`.

Working tree has untracked `handoff/archive/phase-75.7/` and `handoff/current/research_brief_75.8.md`, plus modified audit logs — consistent with phase-75.7 just having closed (Q/A PASS, cycle 3) and 75.8 research already staged.

Two operator decisions from phase-75 are still open per memory: push approval for the held commits, and close-or-re-Q/A on 75.5 (`certified_fallback`). The 75.5 one shows as resolved in git (`33553e46` closed it operator-approved today), so the remaining live question is the push hold.

What do you want to pick up?
